allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add sleep tracking with cycle analysis and quality scoring

Sleep session tracking \(Sleep/Wake buttons on Home\), 90-min cycle
analysis based on SCREEN_ON interruptions, quality scoring \(0-100\),
timeline visualization, and dedicated Sleep screen with session history.

New: SleepAnalyzer.kt, SleepSession entity, DB migration v1->v2,
3-tab bottom nav \(Home/Sleep/Logs\).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Fix sleep timeline to use gap-based cycle blocks

Sleep cycles now track actual uninterrupted stretches between
wake-ups instead of fixed 90-min windows from sleep start.
This matches how real sleep cycles work — waking resets your
cycle, so the next stretch starts fresh.

Timeline blocks now shade by severity \(full/partial/fragmented/restless\)
instead of binary completed/interrupted.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
